reflection:
the line that stuck with me was 'maybe it's because i stopped all the medicine'. you noticed it yourself. two evenings now without l-theanine or magnesium taurate, and last night the sheet was off, you were hot at 4am, heart beating fast in that closed hotel room in izola. that's not random, that's the wind-down stack you'd built up actually doing work for you.

the meds aren't the only piece. you ate a lot of pork late, which sits heavy and runs hot. and you spent the morning hyped from anthony robbins breathing plus claude, then carried that arousal all day. mood evening 6 is honestly fine given that. brain fog 5 makes sense too.

the dad and investor tension in your worry dump is real, not anxiety being silly. you're trying to hold two roles that pull different ways. that needs a clearer conversation with him, not more 4am rumination.

bojan was a gift. childhood friend in your hometown after years. don't undervalue that.

one thing for today: take l-theanine and mg taurate tonight. don't skip again because you feel better. the night you skip is the night you wake feverish.

you're back in ljubljana now, your bed, your sheet. drive the day gently.
opener: you stopped the evening stack two nights running and the body noticed
focus_for_today: take l-theanine and mg taurate tonight, do not skip again
